title: IEA World Energy Outlook 2024 (executive summary)
note: Heavily chart-driven source, so it tests whether the pipeline produces data slides rather than bullet walls. The full 398-page report is available at the same host if a long-source variant is ever wanted.
licence: (c) OECD/IEA. Terms of use restrict redistribution; free download permitted. Local evaluation only.
expectedCharacteristics: Names the STEPS, APS and NZE scenarios without conflating them
Carries the 'age of electricity' framing that the launch deck leads with
Presents figures as data slides rather than prose bullets
